top.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
top.summary: Tehran vows retaliation soon for what it calls an "act of armed piracy", which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.

top.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
top.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

top.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
top.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

top.title: White House and Anthropic hold 'productive' meeting amid fears over Mythos model
top.summary: The discussion is a sign the AI firm's technology may be too critical for even the US government to do without.

top.title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
top.summary: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.

top.title: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
top.summary: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.

title.#text: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket
Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
Nothing’s modular CMF Headphone Pro are down to their lowest price to date
